chapter_title.ar: بَابُ أَنَّ الْأَئِمَّةَ ( عليهم السلام ) يَعْلَمُونَ مَتَى يَمُوتُونَ وَ أَنَّهُمْ لَا يَمُوتُونَ إِلَّا بِاخْتِيَارٍ مِنْهُمْ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 47 – The Imams<sup>asws</sup> are knowing when they<sup>asws</sup> would be passing away, and they<sup>asws</sup> are not passing away except by a choice from them<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/126)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/126)
text: إِنَّ اللَّهَ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ غَضِبَ عَلَى الشِّيعَةِ فَخَيَّرَنِي نَفْسِي أَوْ هُمْ فَوَقَيْتُهُمْ وَ اللَّهِ بِنَفْسِي .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from Muhammad Bin Isa, from on of our companions,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Musa<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic got Angry upon the Shias, so He<sup>azwj</sup> Gave me<sup>asws</sup> a choice, either myself<sup>asws</sup> or them, So I<sup>asws</sup> protected them, by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, with myself<sup>asws</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from some of our people from abu al-Hassan Musa (a.s.) who has said the following. “Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High expressed anger at the Shi‘a. He, therefore, let me choose either myself or them (to receive protection). I swear by Allah, that I protected them with my own soul.”
